events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are asked to output JSON to /app/answer.json. The scenario: trade-work benchmark task for Piping & Plumbing, material transitions, residential job. The work stage is "staged" — materials, tools, access ready, work hasn't begun. Task: evaluate field condition and return decision. The scenario says: "The selected tool and material package for Material transitions matches the size, rating, and application shown on the referenced sheet. The staged parts are clean, intact, and sized for the work shown. Reference material on hand: IPC, mfr listings." So it seems everything is correctly prepared. No defects, conditions not flagged. So decision likely "pass", risk low. Work stage is "staged", percent_complete maybe 0 (work hasn't begun). Component conditions: empty list because none apply. No numeric value, sound, etc. So set those to null/0 default. Confidence: high, say 0.95. Rationale: The staged materials and tools are appropriate per IPC and manufacturer instructions, no issues. References: IPC and manufacturer listings. I'll craft JSON.

Note: "component_conditions" expects a list from given categories: ["installed-defective", "non-compliant", "worn", "degraded", "failed"]. Since none, empty list.

Make sure to follow the shape exactly. Use 0 for percent_complete and value, 0.0 for confidence, event_time, rate. order and workable empty arrays if not applicable. But scenario doesn't mention activity IDs or step IDs, so empty. "sound_source" not needed, so empty string? The schema says "component or source of the sound, when asked", so if not asked, maybe empty string. I'll set to "".

I'll output JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "pass",
  "risk": "low",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [],
  "actions": [],
  "rationale": "The staged tool and material package for the material transition matches the required size, rating, and application per the referenced sheet. Parts are clean, intact, and correctly sized. IPC and manufacturer listings are available and support the selection. No defects or non-compliant conditions observed.",
  "references": ["IPC", "manufacturer listings"]
}
